meaning: adj.心碎的,极度悲伤的,极度沮丧的
examples: He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds.
When you are brokenhearted, I am close to you. Psalms 34:18.
An army for the brokenhearted, marching through the streets.
May God bless the memory of the victims and, in the words of Scripture, heal the brokenhearted and bind up their wounds.
Oberon sat on the floor in a corner of the room, trying to quiet the brokenhearted wailing of the Beastie, but not making a sound himself.
